cooked:
Updated 27th November 2004

Download LBA File Information - HTML Help document[b]

View LBA File Information online[/b]

LBA File Information: The project is a document that contains LBA file information. The document currently only includes packages content, and that too is still mostly incomplete.
The goal of the project is to have all information possible about the LBA files.

Currently having:

  • LBA1
    • HQR
      • ANIM.HQR
      • BODY.HQR
      • FILE3D.HQR
      • FLA_GIF.HQR
      • INVOBJ.HQR
      • LBA_GRI.HQR (incomplete)
      • RESS.HQR
      • SAMPLES.HQR (needs rewrite)
      • SCENE.HQR
      • SPRITES.HQR (needs a bit work)
      • TEXT.HQR
    • VOX
      • English
        • EN_GAM.VOX
        • EN_000.VOX
        • EN_001.VOX
        • EN_002.VOX
        • EN_003.VOX
        • EN_004.VOX
        • EN_005.VOX
        • EN_006.VOX
        • EN_007.VOX
        • EN_008.VOX
        • EN_009.VOX
        • EN_010.VOX
      • French
        • FR_GAM.VOX
        • FR_000.VOX
        • FR_001.VOX
        • FR_002.VOX
        • FR_003.VOX
        • FR_004.VOX
        • FR_005.VOX
        • FR_006.VOX
        • FR_007.VOX
        • FR_008.VOX
        • FR_009.VOX
        • FR_010.VOX
      • German
      • DE_GAM.VOX
        • DE_000.VOX
        • DE_001.VOX
        • DE_002.VOX
        • DE_003.VOX
        • DE_004.VOX
        • DE_005.VOX
        • DE_006.VOX
        • DE_007.VOX
        • DE_008.VOX
        • DE_009.VOX
        • DE_010.VOX
  • LBA2
    • HQR
      • BODY.HQR
      • HOLOMAP.HQR
      • LBA_BKG.HQR (incomplete)
      • OBJFIX.HQR
      • RESS.HQR (incomplete)
      • SAMPLES.HQR(needs rewrite)
      • SCENE.HQR
      • SCREEN.HQR
      • SCRSHOT.HQR
      • SPRIRAW.HQR(incomplete)
    • OBL
      • CITABAU.OBL

If you want to contribute to the project check this thread.
raw:
Updated 27th November 2004

[b][Download LBA File Information](http://chaosfish.free.fr/mbn/LBAfileinfo.zip)[/b] - 'HTML Help' document[b]

[View LBA File Information online](http://chaosfish.free.fr/lbafileinfo/)[/b]

LBA File Information: The project is a document that contains LBA file information. The document currently only includes packages content, and that too is still mostly incomplete.
The goal of the project is to have all information possible about the LBA files.

Currently having:
* LBA1
    * HQR
        * ANIM.HQR
        * BODY.HQR
        * FILE3D.HQR
        * FLA_GIF.HQR
        * INVOBJ.HQR
        * LBA_GRI.HQR (incomplete)
        * RESS.HQR
        * SAMPLES.HQR (needs rewrite)
        * SCENE.HQR
        * SPRITES.HQR (needs a bit work)
        * TEXT.HQR
    * VOX

* LBA2

        * OBJFIX.HQR
        * RESS.HQR (incomplete)
        * SAMPLES.HQR(needs rewrite)
        * SCENE.HQR
        * SCREEN.HQR
        * SCRSHOT.HQR
        * SPRIRAW.HQR(incomplete)
